Suggested GitHub repo "topics" for PokeyForge.

GitHub doesn't read these from a file — paste them into the repo's About panel
(click the gear icon next to "About" on the repo landing page, then "Topics").
Up to 20 topics are allowed; the list below is well under that.

    atari
    pokey
    rmt
    raster-music-tracker
    chiptune
    6502-emulation
    sdl3
    instrument-editor
    8-bit
    retro-audio
    music-tools
    windows
    cpp17

Suggested repo description (the field above the topics):

    PokeyForge - a standalone Windows tool for auditioning, editing, and banking
    Atari RMT (.RTI) POKEY instruments, driven by real 6502 + POKEY emulation.
